AI.data: 数据来源为JWST（James Webb Space Telescope）近红外光谱仪-积分视场单元（NIRSpec-IFU）对木卫二（Europa）前导半球三个观测几何形态下九个敏感水冰、辐射分解产物及挥发物的光谱波段观测数据。
AI.method: 采用光谱分解（spectral factorization）方法分析JWST近红外光谱仪积分场单元（NIRSpec-IFU）观测数据，分离主导光谱变异性的组分并重建其空间分布。
AI.result: CO2富集区域延伸至Tara Regio以外，并以透镜状模式覆盖多个混沌单元（chaos units），且与异常冰纹理特征共存。

title: Newly discovered Luminous blue variable candidates in M31 & M33
summary: This study presents an investigation of nearly two dozen candidate Luminous Blue Variables (cLBVs) in the galaxies M31 and M33. Eight stars have been studied in detail, while an additional sixteen objects are briefly mentioned. Multi-epoch spectra of confirmed cLBVs from LAMOST and previous literature show broad hydrogen, He I lines, abundant Fe II and [Fe II] emission lines, and discernible spectral variability, consistent with the characteristics of known LBVs. Low outflow velocities inferred from P Cygni profiles are also incorporated into the classification criteria. Moreover, key stellar properties, including temperature and luminosity, are determined using the Spectral Energy Distribution (SED) fitting and spectral modeling. By comparison with stellar evolutionary tracks on the temperature luminosity diagram, the initial masses are estimated to be in the range of approximately 32 to 60 $M_{\odot}$. Except for J013401 and J013411, other stars locate within the typical LBV region between the S Doradus instability strip and their outburst phase. More importantly, our sample, except for the binary system, are all positioned in the LBVs region rather than that of B[e]SGs in the near-infrared color-color diagram. Based on all available information, one of the eight sources is confirmed as an LBV, four stars are designated as high-probability cLBVs, and the remaining three stars await further photometric observations to secure their classification. Given the current scarcity of known cLBVs, our study has the potential to make a significant increase in the number of LBVs in M31 and M33.

AI.tldr: 研究确认M31和M33中8颗候选明亮蓝变星(cLBVs)的光谱特征和物理性质，发现1颗确认为明亮蓝变星(LBV)、4颗高概率cLBVs，并估算其初始质量约32-60倍太阳质量，显著增加了这两个星系中已知LBVs的数量。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于近邻星系M31和M33中候选明亮蓝变星（cLBVs）的光谱特征与演化状态，旨在扩充当前稀缺的已知LBV样本并完善其分类标准。
AI.data: 数据来源于LAMOST（Large Sky Area Multi-Object Fiber Spectroscopic Telescope）的多历元光谱以及先前文献中已确认的候选明亮蓝变星（cLBVs）的光谱数据。
AI.method: 采用光谱能量分布(SED)拟合和光谱建模确定关键恒星参数，并通过与温度-光度图上的恒星演化轨迹比较估算初始质量。
AI.result: 在近红外双色图中，除双星系统外，所有样本均位于LBVs区域而非B[e]SGs区域。

title: The Asteroid Framing Cameras on ESA's Hera mission
comment: Accepted for publication in Space Science Reviews (05 March 2026)
summary: As the first asteroid deflection test, NASA's successfully hit asteroid Dimorphos (secondary of the binary asteroid 65803 Didymos) with the DART kinetic impactor on September 26, 2022. To fully characterise the physical properties of the objects, and measure precisely the effects of this impact in the context of planetary defence, ESA launched the Hera mission on 7 October 2024, with scheduled arrival at Didymos in fall 2026. Among the core payload of the mission, the Asteroid Framing Cameras are two identical imaging systems that will support navigation and scientific activities, by acquiring images from various distances and observing geometries during the course of the mission. Built by ena-Optronik (Germany), the cameras match the requirements designed by the science team and will provide data that supports a wide range of investigations: hazard detection, system dynamics, shape reconstruction, surface morphology and mapping, and surface photometry. Each instrument is a panchromatic camera equipped with a 5.5 x 5.5 degree field of view, and an angular resolution of 93.7 micro-radians per pixel. The cameras shall provide the necessary data to address the mission requirements through a global mapping of the two components of the binary system at spatial scales of 2-3 m/pixel in the Early Characterisation Phase, 1-2 m/pixel in the Detailed Characterisation Phase, and 0.5-2 m/pixel in the Close Operation Phase. Dedicated flybys will bring the resolution down to < 10 cm/pixel on specific areas of interest on Dimorphos, such as the DART impact site and the JUVENTAS cubesat landing site. Here, we present the technical specifications of the camera, as well as the status of the calibration. We then summarise the planned operations in cruise and at the asteroids. Finally, we provide examples of the scientific investigations and products that will make use of the data returned by the cameras

AI.tldr: 首次验证了DART动能撞击器成功偏转双星小行星系统65803 Didymos的次级星Dimorphos后，欧空局Hera任务搭载的小行星取景相机(Asteroid Framing Cameras)将通过多阶段高分辨率成像（最高达<10厘米/像素）全面表征该双星系统的物理特性，为行星防御提供关键数据支持。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于通过赫拉任务(Hera mission)的小行星双星系统(65803 Didymos)动力学特性表征及DART撞击效应精确测量，以评估行星防御(planetary defense)策略的有效性。
AI.data: 数据来源于欧空局(ESA)赫拉(Hera)任务搭载的两台相同的小行星框架相机(Asteroid Framing Cameras)，这些相机由德国耶拿-奥普特罗尼克(ena-Optronik)公司制造，将在任务期间从不同距离和观测几何角度获取图像数据，包括全球测绘数据（早期特征阶段2-3米/像素、详细特征阶段1-2米/像素、近距离操作阶段0.5-2米/像素）以及针对特定区域（如DART撞击点和JUVENTAS立方星着陆点）的高分辨率飞越数据（分辨率<10厘米/像素）。
AI.method: 采用两台相同的全色相机（Asteroid Framing Cameras）进行多阶段高分辨率成像，支持导航与科学探测，具备5.5×5.5度视场和93.7微弧度/像素角分辨率，通过不同任务阶段（空间分辨率2-3米/像素至<10厘米/像素）实现全球测绘与局部精细观测。
AI.result: Asteroid Framing Cameras（小行星框架相机）将通过在任务不同阶段（早期特征描述阶段2-3米/像素、详细特征描述阶段1-2米/像素、近距离操作阶段0.5-2米/像素）对双星系统进行全球测绘，并在特定感兴趣区域（如DART撞击点和JUVENTAS立方星着陆点）通过专用飞越实现<10厘米/像素的分辨率，从而提供满足任务需求的数据。

title: Stodolsky effect in the framework of Generalised Neutrino Interactions
summary: We study the Stodolsky effect utilizing the most general form of neutrino interactions with electrons below the electroweak scale by considering all possible Lorentz invariant operators respecting SU(3)$\otimes$U(1) symmetry. We perform our calculation for both Dirac and Majorana neutrinos and find that in the most general setting, only the non-standard neutrino interactions and the tensor interaction terms provide a non-zero contribution, apart from the Standard Model contribution. We investigate the implications for the possible detection of the cosmic neutrino background (C$ν$B) by analysing the energy shifts that are characteristic of the Stodolsky effect. We also discuss the implication of considerable asymmetry in the C$ν$B on the present scenario.

AI.tldr: 通过研究最一般形式的中微子（neutrino）与电子相互作用，发现非标准相互作用（non-standard neutrino interactions）和张量相互作用项（tensor interaction terms）对斯托多斯基效应（Stodolsky effect）有非零贡献，并分析了宇宙中微子背景（CνB）能量偏移及其不对称性对探测的影响。
AI.background: 研究探讨了在电弱能标下利用最一般形式的中微子-电子相互作用（包括所有满足SU(3)⊗U(1)对称性的洛伦兹不变算子）来探索斯托多斯基效应（Stodolsky effect）的理论框架。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源于理论计算（simulation），基于考虑所有可能的洛伦兹不变算子并尊重SU(3)⊗U(1)对称性的中微子与电子相互作用的最一般形式。
AI.method: 采用最一般的洛伦兹不变算子（Lorentz invariant operators）并考虑SU(3)⊗U(1)对称性，分析中微子（neutrino）与电子的相互作用，重点考察非标准中微子相互作用（non-standard neutrino interactions）和张量相互作用项（tensor interaction terms）的贡献。
AI.result: 在标准模型贡献之外，仅非标准中微子相互作用（non-standard neutrino interactions）和张量相互作用项（tensor interaction terms）对斯托多斯基效应（Stodolsky effect）产生非零贡献。

title: Searching for Magnetic White Dwarfs in LAMOST DR10
comment: Accepted for publication in A&A on March 8, 2026. 5 pages + 12 pages in Appendices
summary: Magnetic white dwarfs (MWDs) are key to understanding the origin and evolution of magnetic fields in compact stars. While large spectroscopic surveys such as SDSS have greatly expanded the known sample, the potential of LAMOST has not yet been fully explored. Our aim is to identify and characterize isolated MWDs in the LAMOST DR10 database. We cross-matched LAMOST DR10 spectra with white dwarf candidates from Gaia EDR3 and with recent SDSS-based catalogs of MWDs. Zeeman splitting in Balmer and helium absorption lines was used as the primary diagnostic to identify magnetic fields and to estimate their strengths. Reference objects from SDSS catalogs were used to test the detectability of MWDs in LAMOST low-resolution spectra. We identified 63 isolated MWDs in LAMOST DR10, of which 32 are new discoveries. Surface magnetic field strengths were measured from Zeeman splitting, covering a range from a few MG up to several tens of MG. For previously known SDSS MWDs, our LAMOST-based field measurements show mostly agreement with published values. This work demonstrates the capability of LAMOST low-resolution spectroscopy to identify and characterize isolated MWDs. The newly discovered objects expand the known population and provide valuable targets for future high-resolution spectroscopic and polarimetric follow-up studies. Our results highlight the potential of combining LAMOST with Gaia and other large surveys to build a more complete census of MWDs.

AI.tldr: 利用LAMOST DR10低分辨率光谱结合盖亚（Gaia）数据新发现32颗孤立磁白矮星（MWDs），并测量了其表面磁场强度（几至数十MG），验证了LAMOST在磁白矮星研究中的有效性。
AI.background: 磁白矮星（MWDs）是理解致密恒星中磁场起源与演化的关键研究对象。
AI.data: 数据来源包括LAMOST DR10光谱数据、Gaia EDR3白矮星候选体数据以及基于SDSS的磁白矮星（MWDs）最新星表。
AI.method: 利用塞曼分裂（Zeeman splitting）分析巴尔末线和氦吸收线作为主要诊断手段来识别磁场并估算其强度。
AI.result: 在LAMOST DR10中发现了63颗孤立磁白矮星（MWDs），其中32颗为新发现，并通过塞曼分裂测量其表面磁场强度范围从几MG至数十MG。

title: The Desert Fireball Network Clear-Sky Survey
summary:
Estimating the meteoroid flux density at centimetre to metre sizes is notoriously difficult. Yet it is an important endeavour, as these sizes represent the transition between small meteoroids that pose a risk to spacecraft, and the Near-Earth Objects that are relevant for planetary defense.
  We present a novel automated methodology for debiasing meteor observations from multi-camera networks, applied to data from the Desert Fireball Network (DFN). Our approach utilizes the Hierarchical Equal Area isoLatitude Pixelisation (HEALPix) framework to partition the sky into equal-area pixels at 70 km altitude, enabling precise and convenient measurement of effective survey coverage and fireball counting across the network. We developed a comprehensive data processing pipeline that analyses millions of all-sky camera images to determine clear-sky conditions through automated star source detection and flux distribution analysis.
  As a case study, we apply this methodology to observations of the 2015 Southern Taurid meteor shower, during which there was significant fireball activity. Processing data from 33 cameras over a three-month period (October-December 2015), we calculate an effective observation coverage of $1.58 \times 10^{12}$ km$^2$.h and identified 54 Southern Taurid fireballs from 141 validated detections. Our results are consistent with the extrapolation of previous work done on the same meteor shower at smaller sizes, when we set a $\sim300$ kg.m$^{-3}$ mean meteoroid density, consistent with the cometary origin of the Taurid stream.
  The HEALPix-based approach successfully automates what was previously a labor-intensive manual process, providing a scalable solution for accurate flux measurements from distributed camera networks; it is directly applicable to other meteor surveys.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于HEALPix框架的自动化方法，用于校正多相机网络（如沙漠火球网络DFN）的流星观测数据，并通过对2015年南金牛座流星雨（Southern Taurid）的案例分析，验证了该方法在厘米至米级流星体通量密度（meteoroid flux density）测量中的有效性，结果与彗星起源的流星体密度（~300 kg.m⁻³）假设一致。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于厘米至米级流星体通量密度（meteoroid flux density）的精确估算，填补了威胁航天器的小型流星体与具有行星防御意义的近地天体（Near-Earth Objects）之间的关键数据空白。
AI.data: 数据来源于沙漠火球网络（Desert Fireball Network, DFN）的多摄像头网络观测数据，包括2015年南金牛座流星雨期间33个摄像头在三个月（2015年10月至12月）内拍摄的数百万张全天相机图像。
AI.method: 采用基于HEALPix框架的自动化天空分区方法，结合多相机网络数据，通过恒星源检测和通量分布分析确定晴空条件，实现高效流星体通量测量。
AI.result: 提出了一种基于HEALPix框架的自动化方法，用于校正多相机网络（如沙漠火球网络DFN）的流星观测数据偏差，实现了对70公里高度天空的等面积像素划分和有效覆盖范围的精确测量。

title: Gravitational Anomaly Measurement in Wide Binaries is Sensitive to Orbital Modeling
summary: Recent work by Chae et al. (2026) reported a gravitational anomaly in 36 wide-binary pairs, finding a gravity boost factor of $γ\equiv G_{\rm eff}/G_{\rm N} \approx 1.60_{-0.14}^{+0.17}$ at low accelerations, consistent with predictions from Modified Newtonian Dynamics (MOND). We reanalyze the same dataset using a hierarchical Bayesian model that infers a global $γ$ across all systems while fitting three-dimensional orbital elements. Our model yields $γ= 1.12^{+0.27}_{-0.22}$, consistent with Newtonian gravity ($γ= 1$) at the $\sim0.4σ$ level. To identify the source of the discrepancy, we perform a test using an approach similar to Chae et al. (2026), replacing the semi-major axis with a geometric de-projection of the observed projected separation. This test yields $γ= 1.56^{+0.21}_{-0.18}$, closely matching the result of Chae et al. (2026). This suggests that the inferred value of $γ$ is sensitive to how the three-dimensional orbital separation is modeled, and including an independent semi-major axis parameter can account for velocity excesses that would otherwise be attributed to non-Newtonian gravity.

AI.tldr: 通过分层贝叶斯模型重新分析36个宽双星对(Wide-binary pairs)数据，发现轨道三维建模方法会显著影响引力异常因子$γ$的推算结果，采用独立半长轴参数可使$γ$值降至1.12而与牛顿引力($γ=1$)相符。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于验证修正牛顿动力学（MOND）理论对宽双星系统低加速度区域引力异常（$γ\equiv G_{\rm eff}/G_{\rm N}$）的预测，并探讨不同轨道建模方法对结果的影响。
AI.data: 数据来源于对Chae等人（2026）研究中36个宽双星对的相同数据集（same dataset）重新分析。
AI.method: 采用分层贝叶斯模型（hierarchical Bayesian model）推断全局重力增强因子（γ）并拟合三维轨道参数。
AI.result: 在重新分析宽双星系统数据时，采用分层贝叶斯模型（hierarchical Bayesian model）拟合三维轨道参数得到的重力增强因子（γ）为1.12^{+0.27}_{-0.22}，与牛顿引力（γ=1）在0.4σ水平一致。

title: Searching for axions with time resolved pulsar polarimetry
comment: 9 pages, double column, 2 figures, comments are welcome
summary: Pulsars possess strong dipole magnetic fields that can source axion fields through the axion-photon interaction. Pulsars may therefore be surrounded by axion field configurations oscillating with the pulsar's rotational period. These axions could be detected by observing their effect on the polarization of the pular's emission. In this paper, we use time resolved observations of the optical polarization of the Crab pulsar to place bounds on the axion-photon coupling, demonstrating the potential of time resolved pulsar birefringence in the search for axions.

AI.tldr: 通过蟹状星云脉冲星(Crab pulsar)光学偏振的时间分辨观测，对轴子-光子耦合(axion-photon coupling)给出了限制，展示了时间分辨脉冲星双折射在轴子(axion)搜索中的潜力。
AI.background: 该研究探讨了脉冲星（pulsar）强偶极磁场通过轴子-光子（axion-photon）相互作用产生轴子场（axion field）的可能性及其对偏振观测的影响。
AI.data: 数据来源于蟹状星云脉冲星(Crab pulsar)光学偏振的时间分辨观测(time resolved observations)。
AI.method: 采用时间分辨（time-resolved）光学偏振观测技术分析蟹状星云脉冲星（Crab pulsar）的双折射效应（birefringence），约束轴子-光子耦合（axion-photon coupling）参数。
AI.result: 通过蟹状星云脉冲星(Crab pulsar)光学偏振的时间分辨观测，对轴子-光子耦合(axion-photon coupling)给出了限制，证实了时间分辨脉冲星双折射(time resolved pulsar birefringence)在轴子搜索中的潜力。

title: Holographic dark energy from a new two-parameter entropic functional
summary: We formulate an extended holographic dark energy scenario based on a recently proposed two-parameter generalized entropic functional. Unlike constructions that phenomenologically impose modified entropy-area relations at the horizon level, the present framework is rooted in a microscopic entropy functional and the corresponding microstate counting. For bounded systems, the entropy acquires a generalized holographic scaling with two independent area contributions, recovering the Bekenstein-Hawking entropy in the appropriate limits. Implementing this entropy within the holographic principle, we derive a generalized dark energy density containing two distinct holographic sectors, naturally embedding standard holographic dark energy and $Λ$CDM as limiting cases. We analyze the cosmological evolution for both Hubble and future event horizon cutoffs and show that the model successfully reproduces the matter-to-dark-energy transition. The two entropic exponents enrich the dynamics, allowing for quintessence-like behavior or phantom regimes, while remaining compatible with the standard thermal history of the Universe.
